blocks.description: Program header comments, OPTIONS for report formatting and compression, LIBNAME definitions for raw, staging, and target finance schemas
DATA step cleaning raw financial transactions: standardizes amounts, derives quarter, removes invalid accounts, flags high-value transactions, computes account age
PROC SORT ordering cleaned transactions by account_id and txn_quarter for downstream aggregation
PROC MEANS computing quarterly aggregate statistics per account: sum, mean, max, min of transaction amounts and transaction count
PROC SQL joining quarterly stats with account master to compute utilization ratio (spend vs credit limit) and average transaction size
DATA step categorizing accounts into performance tiers (HIGH_RISK, WATCH_LIST, PERFORMING, LOW_USAGE) with risk tier assignment and composite risk score calculation
Section header comments and TITLE statements for executive report
PROC REPORT generating formatted executive report with branch-level summaries of account performance, utilization, and risk scores
FOOTNOTE statement and TITLE/FOOTNOTE reset statements
